CONTENT.Career: In summer 2014, Mangani left France to play for Chievo, signing a two-year contract with the Serie A club on 6 July 2014. However, after a disappointing season in Italy, where he only played 45 minutes for Chievo, Mangani returned to France with Angers, with whom he signed a three-year deal on 4 July 2015.On 13 June 2022, Mangani signed a two-year contract with newly-promoted Ligue 1 side Ajaccio, returning to the club after fourteen years.Mangani holds both French and Italian nationalities.
CONTENT.External links: Thomas Mangani – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Thomas Mangani at L'Équipe Football (in French)

SUMMARY: Thomas Mathieu Romain Mangani (born 29 April 1987) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Ajaccio.
